page_metadata.biotools__summary:
discovering somatic coding indels from tumor RNA-Seq data.

Somatic indel discovery tool for tumor RNA-Seq data.

RNAIndel calls coding indels from tumor RNA-Seq data and classifies them as somatic, germline, and artifactual. You can also use RNAIndel as a postprocessor to classify indels called by your own caller. RNAIndel supports GRCh38 and 37
